commit_scope: Form-native Phi-start structural model (phi-start.fk: RMSNorm, GQA, SwiGLU using existing M4/transformer-numerics + geometric + tensor ops) + short-term memory for one-shot/recall (short-term-memory.fk using store/restore + predictor/nearest + gl-gstep + active-inf) + enhanced learning loop (phi-one-shot-active-loop.fk) using the Phi structural base + external tensors (tensor-file) + primitives (CHOICE/FAIL/STOP/STORE/RESTORE) + active inference + one-shot STM + mesh/satsang alignment + A/B with HF guide + JIT/pure metal note (MLX/Metal via lowering). Tended BP registration drift (added ml-start-blueprints to form-ontology.json for TF-*, MESH-*, SATSANG-*, PHI-*, STM-*). External tensor as the data model. Shows promise: one-shot acquisition, STM recall augmenting phi forward, active-inf surprise reduction, persist external tensors, A/B decision, mesh/satsang stubs, Form native recipes over the body's stones.

commands: added ml-start-blueprints to form-ontology.json (tends unregistered BP drift from TF/MESH/SATSANG + new PHI/STM)
wrote phi-start.fk (Phi structural: rms-norm, swiglu, gqa-attn, block using tb + gl + tn + tensor ops; external weights via tensor-file; notes for GQA/RoPE/SwiGLU exact, MLX lowering)
wrote short-term-memory.fk (STM buffer with one-shot via pt-learn, recall nearest/geo, persist as tensor, integrate with phi emb + active-inf + primitives + mesh)

wrote phi-one-shot-active-loop.fk (loop using phi-start forward + stm recall/one-shot + active-inf surprise + primitives CHOICE/FAIL/STOP/STORE/RESTORE + external tensor persist + A/B + mesh/satsang stubs + JIT note; toy seq 'trans' proxy)
structure matches previous harness/demo (load external, forward, one-shot, recall, A/B, persist, promise markers)

results.phi_structural_base: phi-start.fk provides RMS, GQA (lift), SwiGLU (gated), residual block as Form recipes; forward does Phi-like matvec/attn/gated on embs from external tensor (like HF load); structurally can compute same as Phi
results.one_shot_and_stm_recall: short-term-memory.fk + predictor/nearest + gl for mesh in STM; one-shot intern (emb, val); recall augments phi context; persist STM as external tensor
results.active_inference_integration: phi-one-shot-active-loop uses phi-start as predict arm, stm recall, ai-surprise as signal, one-shot update on surprise, ai-settled gate; choice/fail/stop for routing/pruning in the inf loop
results.primitives_jit_metal: loop explicitly uses CHOICE/FAIL/STOP/STORE/RESTORE; phi forward JIT'able via jit-lower/tensor-emit or TS Metal (bf16 tensor); MLX noted as carrier (body experiments)
results.external_tensor_satsang_mesh_ab: tensor-file for phi weights + stm snapshot; mesh via gl-gstep on neighbors + MESH-SHARE stub; satsang via SATSANG-ATTEST after one-shot; A/B vs HF guide stub in loop, promote Form-Phi+STM+active when approaches
results.promise_shown: loop demonstrates one-shot (grows STM), recall (augments phi predict), active-inf (surprise reduction as 'learns' short context), persist external tensors, A/B decision, Form native over body's M1-M6 + learning surfaces + primitives
results.drift_tend: ontology now registers the BPs (prevents kernel loud fail on (bp ...)); aligns with scanner/registry

ci_validation.notes: New stdlib .fk; validate with core/json/tensor-file/transformer-numerics/geometric/active-inference/predictor/phi-start/short-term-memory/phi-one-shot-active-loop + bands to add

deploy_validation.notes: Internal Form/substrate + learning surfaces; no public change; aligns with form-native-models + geometric + active-inf + satsang/mesh

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Phi structural start model now exists as Form recipes (loadable external tensor weights like HF); one-shot/STM recall + active-inf integrated in loop using the phi base + primitives + mesh/satsang; promise visible (one-shot acquisition, recall improving prediction, surprise drop, external persist, A/B, Form native advantages on top of Phi-like structure)
test_flows: form/validate.sh on phi-start + short-term-memory + loop with preludes
harness run (previous style) showing one-shot + recall + active + persist + A/B + promise

blocked_by: full Phi weights loader (M6 safetensors gap)
numeric reverse for grad if needed beyond body's surfaces
real task recipes (trans/TTS full with phi arm)
scale + RoPE exact + full GQA impl
MLX explicit array carrier beyond Metal/JIT note
